disclaimer.label: Disclaimer
disclaimer.value: {{projectName}} is a free and_reserved streaming application. It does not host any content itself. {{projectName}} is intended for educational and personal use only.

legal.termsIntro: By accessing and using {{projectName}}, you accept these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
legal.termsUsage: {{projectName}} is a streaming guide that indexes publicly available content from third-party providers. We do not host, store, or distribute any video files.
legal.termsIp: All content displayed belongs to its respective owners. {{projectName}} makes no claims of ownership over any media.

discoverTrending: Discover trending and popular anime series.
